title: catha venenata
intro: Catha venenata, also known as the katemfe or katemfe plant, is a species of evergreen shrub native to tropical Africa. It contains a psychoactive alkaloid called cathinone, which is known for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Catha venenata include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Catha venenata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves and stems can also be dried and used in various herbal preparations, such as capsules or tinctures.
